sentences.target: Ich fahre mit der Bahn zur Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə mɪt deːɐ̯ baːn tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Ich fahre mit der Bahn zur Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə mɪt deːɐ̯ baːn tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.en: I take the train to work.
translations.fr: Je vais au travail en train.
translations.ru: Я еду на работу на поезде.
translations.pt: Vou para o trabalho de comboio.
translations.vi: Tôi đi làm bằng tàu hỏa.
translations.nl: Ik ga met de trein naar mijn werk.
translations.hi: मैं ट्रेन से काम पर जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Πηγαίνω στη δουλειά με το τρένο.
translations.ja: 電車で会社に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular of 'fahren'; main predicate meaning to travel/drive.
Preposition 'mit' governing dative; introduces an instrumental/prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular (agrees with 'Bahn'); object of 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP 'mit der Bahn' expressing means of transport.
Contraction of 'zu der' (preposition + definite article), marking direction to a destination; dative feminine.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'zu(r)', indicating destination.

translations.fr: Aujourd'hui le train est en retard.
translations.it: Oggi il treno è in ritardo.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tàu hỏa bị trễ.
translations.ja: 今日は電車が遅れています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular of 'haben'; used as a lexical verb meaning 'to have'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates the time of the event.
Common noun, feminine singular; complements 'hat' as its accusative object ('has a delay').

sentences.target: Er nimmt die Bahn nach Köln.

translations.de: Er nimmt die Bahn nach Köln.
translations.en: He takes the train to Cologne.
translations.es: Él toma el tren a Colonia.
translations.fr: Il prend le train pour Cologne.
translations.it: Lui prende il treno per Colonia.
translations.ru: Он едет в Кёльн на поезде.
translations.pt: Ele vai de comboio para Colónia.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đi tàu hỏa đến Cologne.
translations.nl: Hij gaat met de trein naar Keulen.
translations.hi: वह ट्रेन से कोलोन जाता है.
translations.el: Αυτός πάει στην Κολωνία με το τρένο.
translations.ro: El merge cu trenul la Köln.
translations.cs: On jede vlakem do Kolína nad Rýnem.
translations.ja: 彼は電車でケルンに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular of 'nehmen'; main predicate.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object 'Bahn'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'nimmt'.
Preposition indicating direction ('to'); used with proper place names without article.
Proper noun (city name); object of the preposition 'nach', indicating destination.

sentences.target: Heute spare ich mit der Bahn Geld.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈʃpaːʁə ɪç mɪt deːɐ̯ baːn ɡɛlt/

translations.de: Heute spare ich mit der Bahn Geld.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈʃpaːʁə ɪç mɪt deːɐ̯ baːn ɡɛlt/
translations.en: Today I save money by taking the train.
translations.es: Hoy ahorro dinero porque voy en tren.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, j'économise de l'argent en prenant le train.
translations.it: Oggi risparmio soldi prendendo il treno.
translations.yue: 我今日搭火車可以慳錢。
translations.ru: Сегодня я экономлю деньги, потому что еду на поезде.
translations.pt: Hoje poupo dinheiro porque vou de comboio.
translations.he: היום אני חוסך כסף כי אני נוסע ברכבת.
translations.tr: Bugün trenle gidiyorum ve para tasarruf ediyorum.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi tiết kiệm tiền bằng cách đi tàu hỏa.
translations.ar: اليوم أوفر المال لأنني أركب القطار.
translations.nl: Vandaag bespaar ik geld door met de trein te gaan.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я економлю гроші, бо їду потягом.
translations.hu: Ma pénzt spórolok, mert vonattal megyek.
translations.hi: आज मैं ट्रेन से जाकर पैसे बचाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Dziś oszczędzam pieniądze, bo jadę pociągiem.
translations.el: Σήμερα εξοικονομώ χρήματα γιατί πάω με το τρένο.
translations.nb: I dag sparer jeg penger fordi jeg tar toget.
translations.id: Hari ini saya menghemat uang dengan naik kereta.
translations.sv: I dag sparar jag pengar genom att åka tåg.
translations.ro: Astăzi economisesc bani mergând cu trenul.
translations.cs: Dnes šetřím peníze, protože jedu vlakem.
translations.da: I dag sparer jeg penge, fordi jeg tager toget.
translations.fi: Tänään säästän rahaa, koska menen junalla.
translations.ja: 今日は電車で行ってお金を節約します。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed sentence-initial; modifies the predicate.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular of 'sparen'; main predicate.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject in verb-second order after the finite verb.
Preposition 'mit' governing dative; introduces an instrumental PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Bahn' as object of 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP 'mit der Bahn' (means of transport).
Common noun, neuter singular; direct object (accusative) of 'spare'.
